stemHtml: A pilot is training to fly a tail-wheel aeroplane, with a single propeller turning clockwise. As the airplane accelerates along the runway, the pilot must use considerable right rudder input to keep the aircraft straight. During the early part of the take-off run, the propeller produces gyroscopic precession, which yaws the aircraft…

options.a: to the left as the tail is lifted, and to the left during rotation.
options.b: to the left as the tail is lifted, and to the right during rotation.
options.c: to the right as the tail is lifted, and to the right during rotation.
options.d: to the right as the tail is lifted, and to the left during rotation.
